title: GROUP_ADD: existing member re-notified on re-add
description: add_group_member_capped uses INSERT OR IGNORE and returns Ok(true) whether the member was newly added or was already present. The GROUP_ADD handler then unconditionally sends a GROUP_DELIVER notification to the member (group_row.name as payload). If a member is re-added (idempotent), they receive a spurious GROUP_DELIVER that looks like an add-invite from the caller. Should check rows_affected() to distinguish new vs already-member and skip the notification on re-add.
